00027 #ifndef JELATINE_ARRAY_H
00028 #   define JELATINE_ARRAY_H (1)
00029 
00030 #include "wrappers.h"
00031 
00032 #include "classfile.h"
00033 #include "header.h"
00034 #include "opcodes.h"
00035 
00036 // Forward declarations
00037 
00038 struct class_t;
00039 
00040 /******************************************************************************
00041  * Array type definitions                                                     *
00042  ******************************************************************************/
00043 
00044 /*
00045  * Non-reference array layout in memory
00046  *
00047  * +--------+
00048  * | header |
00049  * +--------+
00050  * | length |
00051  * +--------+
00052  * | elem 1 |
00053  * +--------+
00054  * | elem 2 |
00055  * +--------+
00056  * |  ...   |
00057  * +--------+
00058  *
00059  * Reference array layout in memory
00060  *
00061  * +--------+
00062  * |  ...   |
00063  * +--------+
00064  * | ref 2  |
00065  * +--------+
00066  * | ref 1  |
00067  * +--------+
00068  * | header |
00069  * +--------+
00070  * | length |
00071  * +--------+ */
00072 
00075 struct array_t {
00076     header_t header; 
00077     uint32_t length; 
00078 #if SIZEOF_JWORD_T == 8
00079     uint32_t padding; 
00080 #endif // SIZEOF_JWORD_T == 8
00081 };
00082 
00084 typedef struct array_t array_t;
00085 
00088 struct ref_array_t {
00089     header_t header; 
00090     uint32_t length; 
00091 #if JEL_POINTER_REVERSAL
00092     uint32_t count; 
00093 #elif SIZEOF_JWORD_T == 8
00094     uint32_t padding; 
00095 #endif // JEL_POINTER_REVERSAL
00096 };
00097 
00099 typedef struct ref_array_t ref_array_t;
00100 
00101 /******************************************************************************
00102  * Globals                                                                    *
00103  ******************************************************************************/
00104 
00105 extern const char *array_names[];
00106 extern uint8_t array_elem_sizes[];
00107 extern uint8_t prim_to_array_types[];
00108 
00109 /******************************************************************************
00110  * Array interface                                                            *
00111  ******************************************************************************/
00112 
00113 extern void arraycopy_ref(array_t *, int32_t, array_t *, int32_t, int32_t);
00114 extern size_t array_get_nref_size(array_t *);
00115 extern size_t array_get_ref_n(array_t *);
00116 
00117 /******************************************************************************
00118  * Array inlined functions                                                    *
00119  ******************************************************************************/
00120 
00124 static inline void *array_get_data(array_t *p)
00125 {
00126     return ((char *) p) + sizeof(array_t);
00127 } // array_get_data()
00128 
00132 static inline uintptr_t *array_ref_get_data(array_t *p)
00133 {
00134     return ((uintptr_t *) p) - 1;
00135 } // array_ref_get_data()
00136 
00140 static inline uint32_t array_length(array_t *p)
00141 {
00142     return p->length;
00143 } // array_length()
00144 
00149 static inline const char *array_name(array_type_t t)
00150 {
00151     return array_names[t - T_BOOLEAN];
00152 } // array_name()
00153 
00158 static inline uint32_t array_elem_size(array_type_t t)
00159 {
00160     return array_elem_sizes[t - T_BOOLEAN];
00161 } // array_elem_size()
00162 
00167 static inline array_type_t prim_to_array_type(primitive_type_t t)
00168 {
00169     return prim_to_array_types[t];
00170 } // prim_to_array_type()
00171 
00172 #endif // !JELATINE_ARRAY_H
Generated on Mon Mar 14 2016 15:38:44 for @PACKAGE_NAME@ by  1.7.1
